name: generate_estimate
description: Same UI as open_calculator: shows the preliminary estimate chooser IN THE CHAT (assistant path vs questionnaire; panel opens only for questionnaire). Use when the user asks about pricing, cost, budget, or a rough estimate. Call only one of open_calculator or generate_estimate per reply, not both.

productType.description: Product type: web app, mobile app, B2B SaaS, marketplace, internal tool, etc.

complexity.description: Rough complexity level: low, medium, or high

scope.description: Design scope and high-level feature list

budgetHint.description: Optional budget hint from the user in USD
